description: Validates that first-round backend components are rendered through an accepted runtime state and that official runtime, local atomic runtime, and explicit fallback are reported separately.

checks.description: Official runtime HTML must include data-render-source="@sanofi-accelerator/elements" and data-component-runtime="sanofi-elements-react". Local atomic runtime HTML must include data-render-source="local-atomic-component-package" and data-component-runtime="sanofi-local-atomic-components".
Runtime-backed components must carry component instance, component id, and story provenance markers.
Runtime-backed HTML must include a JS bundle marker for hydrated component behavior.
Select native:false must not render as a visible native select; it must expose component-owned combobox/listbox behavior.
Fallback modules must be marked as explicit fallback and include data-fallback-reason. First-round backend components must not be fallback modules.

HTML body and validator reports must expose official-runtime, local-atomic-runtime, and explicit-fallback states separately. Page-level markers must use data-output-state-official-runtime, data-output-state-local-atomic-runtime, and data-output-state-explicit-fallback with absent/present values.
